title: Highway 82 Wildfire Candidate Replay
description: Current-event wildfire candidate replay using SWIR/NIR/Red Sentinel-2 burn-scar composites.
task_text: Review the Highway 82 wildfire near Atkinson and Waynesville, Georgia for smoke, burn scar, and vegetation stress.
summary: A candidate-quality wildfire replay. It keeps source dates visible and treats the sequence as review evidence, not a retroactive certainty claim.

alerts.timelapse_analysis: The SWIR/NIR/Red sequence compares pre-fire, ignition-window, active-fire, and latest-clear frames for burn-scar review while preserving the candidate label.
alerts.analysis_summary: The mission is useful as a show-ready wildfire candidate while avoiding a stronger claim than the imagery supports.
alerts.satellite_note: Orbital triage detected a burn-scar candidate in the Highway 82 fire window.
alerts.ground_note: Ground review keeps this as candidate evidence that needs source-backed follow-up before hard labeling.
alerts.ground_action: REVIEW — wildfire candidate packet is downlink-ready, but remains candidate-quality until post-window verification.
findings: SWIR/NIR/Red composite is appropriate for burn-scar review
The packet preserves date windows so later verification can confirm or reject the candidate
